function_calls.params: preferred_time="tomorrow evening", callback_type="wants_payment_amount", reason="Customer lost job, wants to know minimum closure amount. POS unavailable, needs team confirmation."

conversation.text: Hello, this is Alex from DemoCompany, calling about your DemoLender loan. We reviewed your account and have a good offer to help close it. Can we talk for a moment?
Am I speaking with Ravi Gupta?

Great, Ravi. Your account with DemoLender shows fifty thousand rupees pending, and it has been overdue for quite some time. Since the closure figures need to be confirmed with the team, I want to make sure we get you the best possible offer.

Can you tell me a little about your current situation — what has made it difficult to clear this?
Got it, Ravi. So what's been holding you back from clearing this? Is it a cash flow issue right now?
yes i can share not a problem
That's helpful, Ravi. Can you tell me a bit more — is this a temporary situation, or has it been going on for a while?
Yeah it's been tough. I lost my job few months back. But tell me what offer you have? What's the minimum I can pay to close this?

I understand, losing a job makes this really tough. I want to be straight with you — I need to check with the team to get you the exact closure figure. I don't want to quote you something that isn't confirmed. Can I call you back with the best offer we can put together for your account?
Perfect, I'll get those figures confirmed and call you back shortly. What time works best for you today or tomorrow?

Got it, tomorrow evening it is. I'll have the best closure offer ready for you then.

Thank you, Ravi. We'll speak tomorrow evening. Take care.
